description: A US KC-135 refuelling aircraft crashed in western Iraq with at least five personnel aboard, while a second aircraft landed safely. This incident, not attributed to hostile fire, marks the fourth US aircraft loss since late February. The ongoing conflict has resulted in US troop casualties and injuries, alongside a significant death toll in Iran.

title: Indian Wells: Svitolina topples Swiatek as Sabalenka, Rybakina advance
description: While Elina Svitolina will face Elena Rybakina, Aryna Sabalenka will be up against Linda Noskova in the semifinals

title: Mother mixes pesticide in drink to threaten husband; 5-year-old drinks it, dies
description: A five-year-old girl in Eluru district, Andhra Pradesh, tragically died after accidentally drinking a soft drink laced with pesticide. Her mother had mixed the poison in the drink to threaten her husband during an argument, but the child unknowingly consumed it. The girl was rushed to the hospital but succumbed to the poisoning.

title: Mustafizur lands Hundred deal as two Pakistan players also picked in auction
description: The Hundred auction saw Mustafizur Rahman snapped up by Birmingham Phoenix for £100,000.  Two Pakistan spinners, Abrar Ahmed (£190,000 to Sunrisers Leeds) and Usman Tariq (£140,000 to Birmingham Phoenix), also found buyers.  James Coles secured the highest bid of £390,000. The tournament runs from July 21 to August 16.

title: Actor Hansika Motwani shares cryptic post after split from Sohael Khaturiya
description: Actress Hansika Motwani shared a positive message post her divorce finalization from businessman Sohael Khaturiya. The Mumbai Family Court granted the couple a divorce by mutual consent, ending their four-year marriage.  Her lawyer confirmed no alimony claims, emphasizing a dignified closure. The couple married in December 2022.

title: WB BJP leaders meet PM ahead of mega Brigade Rally in Kolkata
description: The meeting comes 48 hours before the Prime Minister is scheduled to address a mega rally at Kolkata’s Brigade Parade Grounds on Saturday. According to sources in the party, the first list of BJP candidates contesting Assembly polls is likely to be announced in the next few days

Trump suggested Khamenei, despite injury speculation, is likely alive and urged vessels to transit the Strait of Hormuz, stating Iran lacks a significant navy.

Oil price today: Crude crosses $100 per barrel again amid Middle East tensions
description: Middle East tensions are sending global oil prices soaring past $100 a barrel, with Brent crude trading at $100.66.  Attacks on Iran have triggered significant supply concerns, potentially leading to the "largest supply disruption" ever.  Despite economic uncertainty, the US prioritizes confronting Iran over oil prices, while global efforts to mitigate the impact are underway.

title: Sacked vendor storms Hindustan Petroleum plant, kills manager & deputy manager
description: Tragedy struck HPCL's Budaun plant as a disgruntled former vendor, Ajay Singh, fatally shot two senior officials, plant manager Sudhir Gupta and deputy manager Harshit Mishra. Singh, allegedly sacked two months prior and facing a prior case, opened fire at close range before fleeing. A manhunt is underway, with security heightened.
